name: Steve Hamilton
transactions: April 3, 1958:Signed by theCleveland Indiansas an amateur free agent.
May 3, 1962:Traded by theCleveland IndianswithDon Rudolphto theWashington SenatorsforWillie Tasby.
April 21, 1963:Traded by theWashington Senatorsto theNew York YankeesforJim Coates.
September 9, 1970:Selected off waivers by theChicago White Soxfrom theNew York Yankees.
March 23, 1971:Traded by theChicago White Soxto theSan Francisco GiantsforSteve Huntz.
January 18, 1972:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago Cubs.
